caption:
The Drone Show in Dubai is back! 

📍Where to watch it?
* The Beach
* Bluewaters
* At the private beach strip. This reel was filmed near Zero Gravity. 
🗓️ Daily until January 29, 2023
🕖 7 PM & 10 PM on good weather conditions 

Tag your fam and besties!

transcription.text: Got another shorty, she ain't nothin' like me Yeah, about to catch another flight The apple bottle make him wanna bite I just wanna have a good night I just wanna have a good night If you don't know now you know If you broke then you gotta let him go You can have anybody, any money
